title: Handpan
noAudio: Audio is unavailable in this browser
profTagline: A playable handpan: strike the tone fields for the sweet 1:2:3 harmonic ring (fundamental, octave, twelfth), pick from 10 tuned scales and 5 voices, let Flow auto-generate a meditative line (a research-backed melodic search — consonance, voice-leading, resolution), record your own loops by striking, and weave them on a grid. Synthesised live, no samples, offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
